1.description: get parcels in Drammen larger than 5000 m²

3.description: find parcels that intersect 200-year flood polygons

4.description: produce one row per parcel (teigid) that intersects flood

5.description: retrieve unique parcel geometries for parcels intersecting flood

7.description: reduce quick-clay polygons to those intersecting the selected parcels

8.description: compute nearest quick-clay distance for each parcel

9.description: sort parcels by nearest quick-clay distance ascending

args.sql:
SELECT teigid, lagretberegnetareal, omrade
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Drammen%'
  AND lagretberegnetareal > 5000
